name: codex-hud
description: Local context HUD and compact footer line for Codex CLI sessions.

scripts.test: node scripts/test-codex-hud.js && node scripts/test-codex-hud-config.js && node scripts/test-patched-codex-installer.js && node scripts/test-sync-release-version.js && node scripts/test-golden.js && node scripts/test-parsing-golden.js && node scripts/test-readme-i18n.js && node scripts/check-readme-i18n.js && node scripts/sync-release-version.js --check
scripts.test:rust: npm run build:rust && node scripts/test-rust-golden.js rust/target/release/codex-hud-rs && node scripts/test-rust-parsing-golden.js rust/target/release/codex-hud-rs && node scripts/test-rust-cli.js rust/target/release/codex-hud-rs

author: Brandon Wie
